# Pull Request

## Description

A clear and concise description of the changes in this PR. What problem does it solve or what feature does it add?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an existing issue)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality will change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Related Issue

Link to the related GitHub issue(s), e.g., `Fixes #123` or `Relates to #456`

## Component(s) Affected

- [ ] Frontend (Angular Control Panel)
- [ ] Frontend (Overlays)
- [ ] Backend (ASP.NET Core)
- [ ] Database/Migrations
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD / Deployment

## Changes Made

### Summary of Changes

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

### Files Modified

- `path/to/file1.ts`
- `path/to/file2.cs`
- (List key files changed)

## How to Test

### Prerequisites

Any setup required to test these changes:

### Test Steps

1. Step 1 to test the change
2. Step 2 to test the change
3. Step 3 to test the change

### Expected Behavior

What should happen when the changes are tested?

## Backend Changes (if applicable)

- [ ] Database schema changes (migration included)
- [ ] API endpoint changes
- [ ] SignalR hub changes
- [ ] Service logic changes
- [ ] New dependencies added

**Breaking changes:** _Describe any breaking changes_

## Frontend Changes (if applicable)

- [ ] Control Panel changes
- [ ] Overlay changes
- [ ] Styling/CSS changes
- [ ] Angular component structure changes
- [ ] New dependencies added

**Affected Overlays:**

- [ ] Score-Box
- [ ] Map-Screen
- [ ] Commentator-Box
- [ ] Info-Box

## Testing & Quality

- [ ] I have tested the changes locally
- [ ] Frontend functionality verified (if applicable)
- [ ] Backend tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Code follows repository conventions
- [ ] Changes are backward compatible (or documented as breaking)

## Screenshots or Logs (if applicable)

Add screenshots showing the changes (especially for UI changes) or relevant logs:

## Additional Notes

Any additional context, decisions made, or things reviewers should know:

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is descriptive
- [ ] Description explains why changes were made
- [ ] Related issue is linked
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] Commits are logical and well-organized
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and follow conventions
